'''wazumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izaar|izaar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izaar|izaar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wazumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzimith|wæzimith]] || [[word:wæzimij|wæzimij]] || [[word:wæzimish|wæzimish]] || [[word:wæzimi|wæzimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazuzumuth|wazuzumuth]] || [[word:wazuzumuj|wazuzumuj]] || [[word:wazuzumush|wazuzumush]] || [[word:wazuzumu|wazuzumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazumuth|wazumuth]] || [[word:wazumuj|wazumuj]] || [[word:wazumush|wazumush]] || [[word:wazumu|wazumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazufmuth|wazufmuth]] || [[word:wazufmuj|wazufmuj]] || [[word:wazufmush|wazufmush]] || [[word:wazufmuf|wazufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazumuthu|wazumuthu]] || [[word:wazumuju|wazumuju]] || [[word:wazumushu|wazumushu]] || [[word:wazumuku|wazumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazumuth|wazumuth]] || [[word:wazumuj|wazumuj]] || [[word:wazumush|wazumush]] || [[word:wazumu|wazumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazumuthul|wazumuthul]] || [[word:wazumujul|wazumujul]] || [[word:wazumushul|wazumushul]] || [[word:wazumukul|wazumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazumuthuthu|wazumuthuthu]] || [[word:wazumujuju|wazumujuju]] || [[word:wazumushushu|wazumushushu]] || [[word:wazumuku|wazumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazumuthun|wazumuthun]] || [[word:wazumujun|wazumujun]] || [[word:wazumushun|wazumushun]] || [[word:wazumukun|wazumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazumuthuoro|wazumuthuoro]] || [[word:wazumujuoro|wazumujuoro]] || [[word:wazumushuoro|wazumushuoro]] || [[word:wazumukuoro|wazumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
